title: Marbella Motor Yacht Rental Day: Costs, Routes and Tips for 2026
html:
For a memorable day on the Costa del Sol, a Marbella motor yacht rental offers the freedom to explore the shimmering Mediterranean from Puerto Banús. Prices for a private crewed motor yacht typically start around €2,500 for a full day, and you can compare verified listings on BoatHire24. Set off from the luxurious marina and cruise towards the exclusive homes of the Golden Mile.

Where to set off in Marbella

Your starting point determines the tone of your day. The most famous departure point is Puerto Banús, a glamorous marina filled with superyachts and designer boutiques. For a more relaxed vibe, Marbella Marina (Puerto Deportivo de Marbella) offers easy access to the town centre. Further east, Puerto Cabopino provides a quieter setting with its sandy dunes. Head south-west to Puerto de la Duquesa for a longer cruise towards Gibraltar, or anchor off the coast of Málaga for a taste of the city from the sea. The bay of Marbella itself is dotted with buoys for lunch stops.

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right vessel depends on your group size and plans. You can browse options including the Princess F70 on the Princess F70 charter page for a true luxury experience. Here is a breakdown of popular choices for a day out:

  1. Sports cruiser (e.g. Axopar 37), ideal for a fast, fun trip to Calahonda; up to 10 guests; from €1,200 half-day.
  2. Flybridge motor yacht (e.g. Princess F70), suited for entertaining on a full-day cruise with up to 12 guests; from €3,500 full day.
  3. Open motorboat (e.g. Azimut Atlantis 43), perfect for coastal hops to Marbella Bay; up to 8 guests; from €1,800 half-day.
  4. Crewed luxury yacht (e.g. Sunseeker 75), for a VIP experience with a skipper and hostess; up to 12 guests; from €4,500 full day.

How much does it cost to rent a motor yacht in Marbella?

Prices vary widely by boat size, season and duration, but you should budget at least €1,200 for a half-day in low season. A typical shared tour on a RIB starts around €90 per person for two hours. A small motorboat (without skipper) for a half-day from Puerto Banús costs from €800. A catamaran for a full-day group charter, ideal for larger parties, ranges from €2,000 to €4,000. A crewed luxury motor yacht for a full day with a professional skipper and fuel can exceed €5,000. For the best choice, compare verified listings on the yacht charter in Marbella page.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

If you rent a boat without a skipper, you typically need a valid Spanish recreational boating licence or an ICC (International Certificate of Competence). Most visitors opt for a crewed charter, where the skipper holds all necessary qualifications. The local wind, the Poniente, often picks up in the afternoon, making morning departures smoother. High season runs from June to September, with July and August being the busiest months. Always confirm exact requirements with the operator before booking.

Book a morning slot to enjoy calm seas before the afternoon Levante wind rises; you will arrive back in time for a relaxed tapas lunch in Puerto Banús.

At a glance

  • Price range: €800, €5,000+ per day (low season half-day to high season full-day luxury yacht).
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September.
  • Trip length: 4 hours (half-day) or 8 hours (full day).
  • Capacity: 2, 12 guests depending on vessel.
  • Currency: Euro (EUR).
  • Licence needed for bareboat: Yes (ICC or Spanish licence); crewed charters include skipper.

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I rent a motor yacht in Marbella without a skipper?

Yes, many boats are available for bareboat charter if you hold a valid ICC or Spanish licence, but most holidaymakers prefer a crewed charter for convenience.

What is the best month for a yacht charter in Marbella?

May and October offer pleasant weather with fewer crowds, though June to September provide the warmest swimming conditions.

How far can I cruise from Marbella in a half-day charter?

A half-day (4 hours) typically allows you to reach Calahonda or Cabopino, a distance of about 10 nautical miles each way, with time for a swim stop.

Are meals included on a crewed motor yacht charter?

Most crewed charters include a light lunch, snacks and beverages; check the listing details for exact inclusions.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own. Whether you are planning a family outing or a corporate event, you can find and compare motor yacht options online. If you own a boat in the region, consider listing it on the platform and become a host to reach travellers searching for their perfect day on the water in 2026.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
